Package egovframework.let.sec.ram.service.impl

Class EgovAuthorRoleManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.sec.ram.service.impl.EgovAuthorRoleManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovAuthorRoleManageService
@Service("egovAuthorRoleManageService") public class EgovAuthorRoleManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovAuthorRoleManageService
권한별 롤관리에 대한 DAO 클래스를 정의한다.
Since:
2009.06.01
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통서비스 개발팀 이문준
